news-global-econ.description: Global energy markets have been jolted this month — with Brent surging back above $91 a barrel

news-global-econ.title: New York far-left group claims reparations 'owed' as Blacks' median wealth 'nearly 15 times less' than Whites
news-global-econ.description: The NYCLU says Black New Yorkers hold nearly 15 times less median wealth than White residents, citing redlining and slavery's legacy in a new report.

news-global-econ.title: Retired Lt. Col. running for Congress backs Trump Iran strategy: 'He's ending a 47-year conflict'
news-global-econ.description: Retired Air Force Lt. Col. Dave Flippo discusses his campaign for Nevada's second district, Trump support, and the ongoing military engagement in Iran.

news-global-econ.title: Unknown ‘Mediators’ Reportedly Float 10-Day Ceasefire for U.S. and Iran
news-global-econ.description:
Unnamed mediators have reportedly shopped a proposal for a ten-day de-escalation ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran.
The post Unknown ‘Mediators’ Reportedly Float 10-Day Ceasefire for U.S. and Iran appeared first on Breitbart.

news-thai-soc.title: One cannabis mistake at airport could bring 10 years in prison and $15,000 fine
news-thai-soc.description: Thailand's new cannabis penalties include up to 10 years in prison, and a cannabis attorney warns travelers that even a mistake is no excuse abroad. A travel expert weighs in as well.

news-global-soc.title: Trump says first call with new UK PM Burnham went 'very well,' pledges US support
news-global-soc.description: Trump pledged U.S. support for Britain's new prime minister after the pair discussed the U.S.-U.K. alliance, trade and Middle East security during their first call.

news-global-soc.title: Colorado's socialist candidate calls for 'more immigrants into office' to stop America's 'exploitative' nature
news-global-soc.description: Colorado congressional candidate Melat Kiros called for more immigrants to enter public office and challenge America's exploitative nature on the global stage.

news-global-soc.title: Rand Paul releases docs that reveal FBI halted border inspection of virus researcher over Wuhan lab links
news-global-soc.description: CBP flagged Peter Daszak as a high person of interest over his gain-of-function research ties to the Wuhan Institute of Virology before the FBI intervened.
